description: Standalone color theory, harmony, swatch, contrast, and theme color generation utilities.

exports.name: assertHexColor
exports.description: Assert that a string is a valid six-digit hex color.

exports.name: generateColorSwatch
exports.description: Generate a full color swatch and diagnostics from a base color.

exports.name: generateHarmonyRoleColors
exports.description: Generate role-based harmony colors from a primary color and harmony strategy.

exports.name: generateNeutralSwatch
exports.description: Generate a softly tinted neutral swatch from generated harmony role colors.

exports.name: generateThemeColors
exports.description: Generate light and dark theme color outputs from theme color input.

exports.name: generateThemeModeColors
exports.description: Generate harmony role colors, swatches, and neutral metadata for a theme mode.

exports.name: getReadableForeground
exports.description: Return the readable black or white foreground color with the stronger contrast against a background color.

exports.name: getThemeModePrimaryHex
exports.description: Parse the primary color configured for a theme mode.

exports.name: isHexColor
exports.description: Check whether a string is a valid six-digit hex color.

exports.name: parseHexColor
exports.description: Parse a string as a six-digit hex color and return null when it is invalid.

exports.name: parseHexColorOrThrow
exports.description: Parse a string as a six-digit hex color or throw when it is invalid.

sourceFunctions.description: Return the readable black or white foreground color with the stronger contrast against a background color.

sourceFunctions.name: assertHexColor

sourceFunctions.name: clampNumber
sourceFunctions.description: Clamp a number to a finite minimum and maximum range.

sourceFunctions.name: normalizeHueDegrees
sourceFunctions.description: Normalize hue degrees into the zero-to-three-sixty range.

sourceFunctions.name: parseHexToOklch
sourceFunctions.description: Convert a hex color into a normalized OKLCH color object.

sourceFunctions.name: oklchToHex
sourceFunctions.description: Convert an OKLCH color object into an in-gamut hex color.

sourceFunctions.name: deltaEoklch
sourceFunctions.description: Calculate the perceptual OKLCH distance between two OKLCH colors.

sourceFunctions.name: contrastRatio
sourceFunctions.description: Calculate the WCAG contrast ratio between two color inputs.

sourceFunctions.name: pickTintSourceHex
sourceFunctions.description: Pick the harmony color that should tint the generated neutral swatch.

sourceFunctions.name: clampNumber
sourceFunctions.description: Clamp a number to a finite minimum and maximum range.

sourceFunctions.name: generateNeutralSwatch
sourceFunctions.description: Generate a softly tinted neutral swatch from generated harmony role colors.

sourceFunctions.name: clamp01
sourceFunctions.description: Clamp a number into the normalized zero-to-one range.

sourceFunctions.name: chromaMultiplierForStep
sourceFunctions.description: Return the chroma multiplier used for a swatch step.
